# WhataHotel! — Homes: Villas & Residences

> WhataHotel! by Lorraine Travel is a luxury travel agency (Member, Signature Travel Network; founded 1948). This is the **Homes** collection landing page — a curated search-and-discovery experience for residential-style accommodations (villas, residences, homes and estates) at 271 of the world's finest hotels and resorts. Travelers browse by region and collection, open an individual property, and check live availability. "Check Availability" links to each property's existing WhataHotel booking flow with `type=homes`, which returns only residential-style inventory (villas, residences, homes) by matching the approved keywords against the actual room/unit descriptions.

The collection is the exact list of 271 properties published on the official WhataHotel Homes page. Each property links to its canonical individual page at `https://whatahotel.com/hotels/<hotelID>/<slug>.html`. Categorisation is by real geography (region) and real brand (collection) — never inferred from a hotel's name.

## Key pages

- [Homes — Villas & Residences (official collection)](https://whatahotel.com/homes/): The authoritative WhataHotel page listing all 271 residential-style properties, grouped by country and city.
- [WhataHotel! home](https://whatahotel.com/): The full WhataHotel site by Lorraine Travel.

## Browse by region

The 271 properties span six regions: North America (76), Latin America & Caribbean (74), Asia (52), Europe (34), Middle East & Africa (20), and the Pacific & Indian Ocean (15). Travelers can filter the collection by region and by collection/brand (Four Seasons, Hyatt, Leading Hotels of the World, Aman, Belmond, Rosewood, Ritz-Carlton, Mandarin Oriental and more).

- [The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Waikiki Beach](https://whatahotel.com/hotels/3287/the-ritz-carlton-residences-waikiki-beach.html): Honolulu, United States

## How booking works

1. **Search / filter** the Homes collection by destination, region or collection.
2. **Open a property** to see its photos, description, location and collection.
3. **Check Availability** opens the property's live WhataHotel availability with `type=homes`, filtered to residential-style units (villas, residences, homes) where the property offers them. Eligibility is decided per unit from the actual room/unit description — never from the hotel's name.
4. **Book** through WhataHotel, operated by Lorraine Travel, a Preferred Partner agency with Signature Travel Network perks.

## About

- [About Lorraine Travel / WhataHotel!](https://whatahotel.com/): WhataHotel! is operated by Lorraine Travel, in business since 1948, a member of Signature Travel Network offering exclusive rates and amenities at luxury hotels and resorts worldwide.

## Optional

- [Contact WhataHotel!](https://whatahotel.com/contact.cfm): Reach the Lorraine Travel team for help planning a residential-style stay.
